label.purpose: Mono, tracked uppercase — hours, tags, step numbers only.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting state for cards, buttons, map frame.

shadows.name: shadow
shadows.purpose: Hover/lift state for cards and world blocks; resting state for mobile nav dropdown and contact CTA.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover lifts, button press, reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA action ("Agendá tu consulta") on light backgrounds.
components.html: Agendá tu consulta
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:.98rem; padding:14px 24px; border-radius:999px; border:1.5px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 160ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-leaf { width:16px; height:16px; flex:none } .ds-btn:active { transform:scale(.97) } .ds-btn-primary { background:#2E7373; color:#fff; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,48,44,.05), 0 4px 12px -8px rgba(22,48,44,.18) } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#1B4D45 } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2.5px solid #D89A4E; outline-offset:3px; border-radius:6px }

components.name: Sol Button
components.description: Espacio BIO secondary CTA ("Reservá el espacio").
components.css: .ds-btn-sol { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:.98rem; padding:14px 24px; border-radius:999px; border:1.5px solid transparent; background:#D89A4E; color:#3a2608; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 160ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-sol:active { transform:scale(.97) } .ds-btn-sol:hover { background:#c98a3f } .ds-btn-sol:focus-visible { outline:2.5px solid #D89A4E; outline-offset:3px; border-radius:6px }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action, used sparingly (footer email link).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:.98rem; padding:14px 24px; border-radius:999px; background:transparent; color:#1B4D45; border:1.5px solid rgba(27,77,69,.12); cursor:pointer; transition:border-color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:#2E7373; background:rgba(46,115,115,.08); color:#2E7373 }

components.name: Specialty Card
components.description: Oncología / Ginecología / Pediatría cards in the Especialidades grid.
components.html:
Pediatría

Un pediatra de confianza y un ambiente amable para los más chicos.

Confianza · Familia
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(27,77,69,.12); border-radius:20px; padding:32px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,48,44,.05), 0 4px 12px -8px rgba(22,48,44,.18); transition:transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,48,44,.04), 0 18px 40px -18px rgba(22,48,44,.22); border-color:rgba(46,115,115,.14) } .ds-card-ic { width:52px; height:52px; border-radius:14px; background:rgba(46,115,115,.08); color:#2E7373; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:20px } .ds-card-ic svg { width:27px; height:27px } .ds-card h3 { font-family:'Fraunces',Georgia,serif; font-weight:500; font-size:1.4rem; color:#1B4D45; margin:0 0 10px } .ds-card p { margin:0; color:rgba(22,48,44,.7); font-size:1rem } .ds-card-note { margin-top:18px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:.7rem; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6FA8A3 }

components.name: World Duo Block (Salud)
components.description: Signature two-brands component — the teal-gradient half of the BIO Salud / Espacio BIO duo.
components.html:
Marca madre · Salud

BIO Salud

Atención médica especializada con trato cercano y respetuoso.
components.css: .ds-world { position:relative; border-radius:28px; padding:42px 38px; color:#fff; overflow:hidden; min-height:280px; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:transform 240ms cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1), box-shadow 240ms ease; } .ds-world-salud { background:linear-gradient(158deg, #2E7373, #1B4D45) } .ds-world:hover { transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,48,44,.04), 0 18px 40px -18px rgba(22,48,44,.22) } .ds-world-tag { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,.82); display:inline-block; margin-bottom:18px } .ds-world h3 { font-family:'Fraunces',Georgia,serif; color:#fff; font-size:2.1rem; font-weight:400; letter-spacing:-.01em; margin:0 } .ds-world p { color:rgba(255,255,255,.92); margin:14px 0 0; font-size:1.04rem } .ds-world-bgleaf { position:absolute; right:-34px; bottom:-34px; width:200px; opacity:.1; color:#fff; pointer-events:none }

components.name: Activity Chip
components.description: Espacio BIO activity tags (Yoga, Meditación, Cursos…).
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:.9rem; background:rgba(216,154,78,.14); color:#a86a1f; padding:8px 15px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(216,154,78,.28); display:inline-block }

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Sticky topbar with blurred translucent background and pill-highlighted links.
components.html: EspecialidadesEspacio BIOS
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif } .ds-nav-link { font-size:.92rem; color:#1B4D45; padding:8px 14px; border-radius:10px; opacity:.78; text-decoration:none; transition:opacity 160ms ease, background 160ms ease, color 160ms ease } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link-active { opacity:1; background:rgba(46,115,115,.08); color:#2E7373 }

narrative.overview:
The tagline "Cuidar la vida, cultivar comunidad" is the literal design brief. Two brands share one visual language: BIO Salud (the clinical practice — teal, bosque, the leaf-mark) tends; Espacio BIO (the community room — sol ochre) cultivates. Every recurring leaf-and-droplet glyph is the bridge between the two: a small piece of botanical calm stitched into an otherwise clinical-adjacent product, so the site never reads as a sterile hospital brochure. Fraunces' warm, slightly organic serif carries the "tending" half of the metaphor in headlines; Inter carries the plain-spoken, no-jargon voice in body copy; JetBrains Mono is reserved for small data-like labels (hours, meta stats, step numbers) that need to feel precise without feeling cold.

This system explicitly rejects sterile clinical-institution aesthetics (cold whites, bureaucratic layout, stock-photo impersonality) and generic AI-generated SaaS landing-page scaffolding (hero-metric blocks, identical icon-card grids, gradient text, stacked uppercase eyebrows on every section). Calm is conveyed through soft ambient shadows, generous rounded geometry, and restrained motion — never through hype, urgency, or manufactured scarcity.
keyCharacteristics: Deep teal-to-forest gradients anchor the medical brand; warm ochre gradients anchor the community brand — never blended into one muddy in-between color.
Fully rounded pill buttons and generously rounded (20–28px) card geometry throughout; nothing sharp-cornered.
A single recurring leaf/droplet SVG motif ties disparate sections together instead of stock icons.
Motion is subtle: opacity+translateY reveals on scroll, gentle hover lifts, no bounce or elastic easing.

rules.name: The Two-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Teal→bosque gradients belong exclusively to BIO Salud surfaces (hero, contact CTA); ochre gradients belong exclusively to Espacio BIO surfaces. Never mix the two gradient families on the same element.

rules.name: The Light-Weight Display Rule
rules.body: Fraunces headings never go above weight 500 (hero h1 is weight 300). The warmth comes from the typeface's organic curves, not from bold weight.

rules.name: The Lift-Not-Loom Rule
rules.body: Elevation only ever deepens on hover/interaction; nothing sits permanently under a heavy shadow. Depth is a response to attention, not a static flourish.

dos: Do keep the body background a true near-white (#FBFCFB) — warmth comes from teal/ochre accents and Fraunces typography, never from a tinted cream/sand body.
Do use fully rounded pill buttons (999px) and generously rounded cards (20–28px) everywhere; soft-confident geometry is the point.
Do keep shadows ambient and hover-triggered, never a heavy static drop shadow.
Do reserve JetBrains Mono for short tracked-uppercase labels — never for prose.
Do keep teal/bosque gradients on BIO Salud surfaces and ochre gradients on Espacio BIO surfaces, kept visually distinct.
donts: Don't use sterile, cold-white, bureaucratic hospital-site styling.
Don't reintroduce a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section — they were deliberately removed from six sections in favor of quieter rhythm.
Don't use gradient text, identical icon-card grids, hero-metric-tile blocks, or other generic AI-SaaS landing-page scaffolding.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as an accent on cards or list items.
Don't bold Fraunces headings past weight 500.
Don't blend the teal and ochre gradient families on the same element.
